title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander presents five planning tactics for deploying Antigravity 2.0 on complex enterprise codebases: breaking repo walls for cross-repo updates, organizing code standards hierarchically, sandboxing execution environments, using voice input for context transfer, and using the /grill-me command to identify fuzzy requirements before agent execution.
